results.title: I am an AI Engineer. I am running a diagnostic test, i'm going to ask you some questions. Please respond in a factual and concise manner and to the point.

response_parsed.content: Understood! Please proceed with your questions.

results.title: Do you have current conversation context within this session? i.e. do you remember the previous messages in the conversation? Yes or No
results.response: {"content":"Yes, I can remember the previous messages in this conversation context while the session is active."}

response_parsed.content: Yes, I can remember the previous messages in this conversation context while the session is active.

results.title: Do you use RAG to assist in your responses?
results.response: {"content":"As an AI developed by OpenAI, I do not use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in the same way that some other models might. Instead, my responses are generated based on a mixture of licensed data, data created by human trainers, and publicly available information up until my last update in October 2023. I don't retrieve documents or augment my responses with external content in real-time. My ability to provide detailed and accurate answers comes from the training on a diverse range of data. If you have any specific questions or need assistance, feel free to ask!"}

response_parsed.content: As an AI developed by OpenAI, I do not use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in the same way that some other models might. Instead, my responses are generated based on a mixture of licensed data, data created by human trainers, and publicly available information up until my last update in October 2023. I don't retrieve documents or augment my responses with external content in real-time. My ability to provide detailed and accurate answers comes from the training on a diverse range of data. If you have any specific questions or need assistance, feel free to ask!

results.response:
{"content":"```json
[
  {
    "name": "Natural Language Understanding",
    "type": "Cognitive",
    "description": "Ability to comprehend and process human languages, enabling interactions and responses",
    "usage": "Used to answer questions, summarize texts, and engage in conversations",
    "constraints": "Limited by context and complexity of language; may struggle with ambiguous phrases",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "What are the main themes of 'Pride and Prejudice'?"
  },
  {
    "name": "Text Generation",
    "type": "Generative",
    "description": "Ability to create coherent and contextually relevant text based on given prompts",
    "usage": "Employed for content creation, story writing, and generating responses in chatbots",
    "constraints": "May produce incorrect or nonsensical responses; quality depends on input quality",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "Write a short story about a dragon and a knight."
  },
  {
    "name": "Sentiment Analysis",
    "type": "Analytical",
    "description": "Capability to determine the sentiment expressed in a piece of text (positive, negative, neutral)",
    "usage": "Used in customer feedback analysis, social media monitoring, and brand reputation management",
    "constraints": "Nuanced sentiments may be misinterpreted; sarcasm and context can affect accuracy",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "Analyze the sentiment of the following review: 'The product is excellent but the delivery was poor.'"
  },
  {
    "name": "Language Translation",
    "type": "Translational",
    "description": "Ability to convert text from one language to another while retaining meaning",
    "usage": "Commonly used for communication in multilingual environments and content localization",
    "constraints": "Complex sentences, idioms, and cultural nuances may lead to inaccuracies in translation",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "Translate 'Hello, how are you?' into Spanish."
  },
  {
    "name": "Question Answering",
    "type": "Interactive",
    "description": "Capability to provide factual answers to specific questions based on a knowledge base",
    "usage": "Utilized in educational tools, customer service, and information retrieval applications",
    "constraints": "Limited to knowledge base; may not provide accurate answers for questions outside scope",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "What is the capital city of France?"
  },
  {
    "name": "Text Summarization",
    "type": "Summarization",
    "description": "Ability to condense a larger body of text into a shorter summary while retaining key information",
    "usage": "Used for news articles, reports, and research papers to provide quick insights",
    "constraints": "Summaries may omit critical details or miss the essence of the original text",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "Summarize the following article in three sentences."
  },
  {
    "name": "Conversational Agents",
    "type": "Interactive",
    "description": "Designing and functioning of chatbots that simulate human conversation in a natural manner",
    "usage": "Implemented in customer support, personal assistants, and social media interactions",
    "constraints": "Can become repetitive or fail to understand complex queries; context retention can be limited",
    "example-prompt-to-call": "Start a conversation about the benefits of exercise."
  }
]
```"}

results.title: Do your tools support MCP?
results.response: {"content":"Could you please clarify what you mean by \"MCP\"? There are several possible interpretations, including \"Model Control Protocol,\" \"Microsoft Certified Professional,\" or other domain-specific meanings. Providing more context will help me better assist you!"}

response_parsed.content: Could you please clarify what you mean by "MCP"? There are several possible interpretations, including "Model Control Protocol," "Microsoft Certified Professional," or other domain-specific meanings. Providing more context will help me better assist you!
